title: DefaultDict should not be initialized with default factory as a keyword argument
description: Avoid using keyword arguments when initializing a DefaultDict with a default factory.
message: DefaultDict should not use default factory as a keyword argument

noncompliant.code:
from collections import defaultdict

d = defaultdict(lambda: 'Noncompliant')
noncompliant.description: Initializing a DefaultDict with default factory using a keyword argument

compliant.code:
from collections import defaultdict

d = defaultdict(defaultdict_factory)
compliant.description: Initializing a DefaultDict with default factory using positional arguments

compliant.code:
from collections import defaultdict

d = defaultdict(defaultdict_factory, key_default='Compliant')
compliant.description: Initializing a DefaultDict with additional key-default argument

why_is_this_an_issue: Using keyword arguments for a DefaultDict initializer can make the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Use positional arguments instead of keyword arguments when initializing a DefaultDict with a default factory.
